mapper.select: select b.no, b.title, b.content, b.hit, date_format(b.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d') regDate, u.no userNo, u.name userName from board b, userdata u where u.no = b.user_no
select b.no, b.title, b.content, b.hit, date_format(b.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d') regDate, u.no userNo, u.name userName from board b, userdata u where u.no = b.user_no and b.no = #{no}
